final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) with area > 5000 m2 in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

4.description: reduce flood zones to municipality extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect the municipality flood zones

6.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons (kartleggingsomrade) in the national layer

7.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to municipality extent

8.description: find nearest quick-clay zone to each parcel that intersects flood zone and compute distance

9.description: sort parcels by ascending distance to quick-clay zone

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, lagretberegnetareal, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: Find Drammen municipality record and geometry

2.description: Get parcels in the municipality larger than 5000 m² using the municipality number from step 1

3.description: Get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall = 200) for later reduction by municipality

4.description: Get quick-clay mapping polygons for later reduction by municipality

5.description: Reduce 200-year flood polygons to those intersecting the Drammen municipality geometry (step 1 left, step 3 right)

6.description: Reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting the Drammen municipality geometry (step 1 left, step 4 right)

7.description: Find parcels (step 2 left) that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons (step 5 right)

8.description: For each parcel intersecting flood (step 7 left), find nearest reduced quick-clay polygon (step 6 right) and compute distance

9.description: Sort parcels by ascending distance to nearest quick-clay (from step 8)

10.description: Return the top 10 parcels closest to quick-clay (after sorting)
